question: According to the market share percentages shown in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Huawei has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Xiaomi has the smallest market share.
options.C: Apple has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.D: Samsung and Others have the same market share.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (33%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Xiaomi is largest when relying on visual comparison.
